# Proof Trading SDK — GitHub Copilot instructions

Same policy lives in `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, and `.cursorrules`.

## Branching & pull requests

1. Commit on a `<type>/<slug>` branch (where `<type>` ∈ `chore`, `feat`, `fix`,
   `docs`, `hotfix`, `infra`, `refactor`) — never directly on `main`.
2. Keep each PR to one logical change; add a test with every behaviour change.
3. Title each PR with a single Conventional Commits prefix.

See `CONTRIBUTING.md` for the full workflow and `SECURITY.md` for reporting
vulnerabilities privately (never in a public issue or PR).
